visual: Shoulder-width parallel stance with both arms crossing in front of the chest, wrists stacked, palms facing inward.
motion_description: The practitioner settles into a parallel, shoulder-width stance, distributing weight evenly as the knees bend into a gentle squat. Both arms slowly sweep downward from an outstretched, lateral position, curving inward to cross at the wrists in front of the abdomen with the right arm on the outside. As the legs straighten, the crossed arms lift to chest height with palms facing the torso, before uncrossing and spreading slightly outward with palms facing forward in a continuous, steady flow.
